overview: This animal appears to be a Belgian Malinois, a breed often mistaken for a German Shepherd. They are known for their high energy, intensity, and suitability as working dogs, such as in police or military roles. Athletically, they can reach speeds up to 30 miles per hour and are capable of clearing high walls. American Kennel Club +2 3 sites Belgian Malinois Dog Breed Information - American Kennel Club Belgian Malinois are squarely built, proud, and alert herders standing 22 to 26 inches.
